robots.txt for www.univ-lyon2.fr disallowed technical/admin paths only; selected public pages and media URLs were not disallowed.
Direct robots.txt request returned 403, but selected public Moodle pages and PDF resources were accessible through ordinary public fetches and Firecrawl without login or bypass.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a formal Université Lumière Lyon 2 internal regulation with AI-specific integrity language, an official SPS PDF offering teaching and assessment guidance for generative AI, and official open Moodle course pages that contextualize the SPS guidance and PÉDAGOGIA training. Event, research-project, and unrelated convention candidates were rejected as unsuitable claim evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: IA génératives : quels repères pour l’enseignement à l’ULL2 ?

stopConditions: Use only official Université Lumière Lyon 2 controlled sources.
Treat the SPS Repères IA document as guidance and discussion material, not a formal binding policy.
Treat the règlement intérieur as the formal source for disciplinary AI-use language.
Do not use event listings, research-showcase pages, external resources, or unrelated PDF conventions as claim evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: IA génératives : quels repères pour l’enseignement à l’ULL2 ?
Enseigner et apprendre à l'ère de l'IA

artifacts.claimText: Université Lumière Lyon 2's règlement intérieur prohibits using an artificial-intelligence tool in university work without explicit mention, and prohibits presenting AI-generated content as personal human work, under disciplinary proceedings.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI-generated content must be explicitly mentioned; presenting it as personal human work is prohibited.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Lyon 2 SPS guidance says AI should not do assessed work in place of the student; AI assistance may be possible only when it respects university ethics and the specific instructions for the exam or assignment.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI assistance is conditional on academic ethics and assignment/exam instructions; AI should not replace the student's work.

citation.citationTitle: IA génératives : quels repères pour l’enseignement à l’ULL2 ?
citation.publisher: Université Lumière Lyon 2 Service de pédagogie du supérieur
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Lyon 2 SPS guidance recommends that instructors explicitly state expected conditions for student work, including obligations, permissions, recommendations, prohibitions, whether generative AI may be used, and how any use should be signaled.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Instructors are guided to clarify AI-use conditions and disclosure expectations for student work.

artifacts.claimText: Lyon 2 SPS guidance warns that generative-AI text detectors have limited reliability, provide only a degree of presumption, and cannot identify a source like similarity detectors, making their results unusable in appeals.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI-detection outputs are framed as unreliable and not sufficient disciplinary proof.

artifacts.claimText: Lyon 2 SPS guidance tells students to follow instructor instructions for citing AI-generated text; if no instruction is provided, it suggests noting the software publisher, software name, and initial prompt.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI-generated text citation should follow instructor instructions, or identify the tool publisher, tool name, and initial prompt when no instruction exists.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Les travaux universitaires, qu’ils émanent des étudiantes et étudiants ou des enseignantes et enseignants, et enseignantes-chercheuses et enseignants-chercheurs, doivent revêtir un caractère personnel... l’exigence d’un travail personnel interdit... de recourir à un outil d’intelligence artificielle lors de la production de travaux sans en faire mention explicitement. Il est en effet interdit de présenter les contenus générés par un outil d’intelligence artificielle comme un travail personnel et une œuvre humaine, sous peine de poursuites disciplinaires.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: University work must be personal; using an AI tool without explicit mention and presenting AI-generated content as personal human work is prohibited under disciplinary proceedings.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Titre 1, Chapitre 3, 4. Respect des règles de propriété intellectuelle, lutte contre le plagiat et intégrité intellectuelle
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: IA génératives : quels repères pour l’enseignement à l’ULL2 ?
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Dans le cadre du contrôle des connaissances et compétences, l'IA ne devrait jamais "faire à la place" de l'étudiant... Une IAG pourrait être utilisée comme assistance à la production... à condition que cela ne contrevienne ni à la déontologie universitaire... ni aux règles spécifiques de l'examen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For assessment, AI should never do the work instead of the student; it may be used as assistance only if it respects university ethics and exam-specific rules.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: La question des devoirs et examens

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Comment citer un texte produit par une IA ? Reportez-vous aux consignes données par votre enseignante ou enseignant. artifacts.notes: Formal règlement intérieur claim is narrowly scoped to the AI-specific paragraph on explicit mention and presenting generated content as personal human work.
Scoped to SPS guidance, using conditional language rather than treating the guidance as a universal ban or permission.
Uses the SPS document as teaching guidance and preserves the source's recommendation/clarification framing.
Supported by direct SPS language about detector reliability and appeal limitations.
Citation claim is scoped to SPS guidance and says to follow instructor instructions first.
Privacy claim is a caveat from teaching guidance, not a formal data-handling policy.

artifacts.title: Université Lumière Lyon 2 AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official Université Lumière Lyon 2 sources include the current règlement intérieur, which contains a formal AI-related academic-integrity rule, and an SPS guidance PDF on generative AI in teaching and assessment. The SPS source is staged as guidance/discussion material rather than binding policy; event, research-project, and unrelated convention sources were rejected.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Only the règlement intérieur is treated as a formal institutional rule; the SPS Repères IA PDF is treated as guidance and discussion material.
No official Lyon 2 library-specific AI citation guide was found in the searches performed.
The public Moodle robots.txt request returned 403, but public Moodle pages and PDF resources were accessible through ordinary public fetches without login or bypass.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
